narrative:
New Franklin 4-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,126 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.4%, a modest Republican lean of 4.3 percentage points.
